description.value:
You deftly command your Pod to focus its efforts toward aiding you in combat, utilizing its built-in arsenal in a way befitting the situation. Once, during the duration of this jutsu, your Pod can grant you one of the following benefits, at which point this jutsu then ends:

A160 - Missile:

  • Your Pod readies itself to propel you forward to engage in combat. You increase your movement speed by +20 and gain the benefits of both the Dash and Disengage actions until the end of your next turn.

A090 - Wire:

  • Your Pod creates an extended wire of solid light that allows a swift approach. Select a point that you can see within 90 feet of you and move there without spending movement. If you would end this movement within 5 feet of a creature, your next attack against them is made at advantage. If you would select a surface that you cannot stand on normally, you can latch onto that surface until you move again.

  • Alternatively, you can select a creature within 60 feet of you, making a ranged Taijutsu attack against them. On a hit, that creature is grappled and pulled to a space within 5 feet of you.

R010 - Laser:

  • Your Pod supplements your attack with a powerful laser that strikes along with you. Your next attack ignores up to 3/4ths cover, and if a creature would gain the benefits of a reaction that increases their AC against it, that bonus is halved.

R030 - Hammer:

  • Your Pod withdraws a massive hammer that you can swing at your leisure. Your next weapon attack or Taijutsu attack gains a number of ranks of Reach equal to your Dexterity or Intelligence modifier. Regardless of a hit or miss, all other creatures within 30 feet of the initial attack's target (excluding you) must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking half of the attack's damage, falling prone, and being Dazed on a failure.

  • This area then becomes difficult terrain.

R040 - Blade:

  • Your Pod begins to spin a blade of pure energy at high speed, wreaking havoc on those it touches. Your next weapon or Taijutsu attack targets all hostile creatures within 15 feet of you. On a successful hit, creatures must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 2 ranks of Bleed on a failure.

R050 - Spear:

  • Your Pod produces a mass of energy that springs from the ground in the shape of spears. Your next weapon or Taijutsu attack targets all creatures within a 20-foot-long, 10-foot-wide line. On a successful hit, creatures must make a Strength saving throw, being Dazed on a failure.
